title: Transformations of Trig Graphs (amplitude, period, phase shift)

flashcards.definition: |A| in y = A sin(Bx − C) + D; the maximum displacement from the midline.
2π/|B|; the horizontal length of one complete cycle.
C/B; the horizontal shift of the graph (right if positive).
Moves the midline from y = 0 to y = D.
If A < 0, the graph is flipped over the x-axis.
